description_long: This is a compact, modern police car with a hatchback design, featuring a predominantly black body accented by high-visibility blue and yellow checkerboard patterns along the sides and rear. The word 'POLICE' is prominently displayed in blue on the lower side panels and rear bumper. The vehicle is equipped with a roof-mounted emergency light bar, and its wheels are detailed with silver alloy rims. The rear of the car displays chevron-style reflective markings in red and yellow, enhancing its visibility. The windows are tinted, and the car has side mirrors in a contrasting light color, likely white or silver.
description: A compact black police car with blue and yellow checkerboard markings, roof lights, and reflective chevrons on the rear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black hood, windshield, and roof-mounted emergency light bar.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue and yellow checkerboard pattern, 'POLICE' text, and alloy wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the chevron reflective markings, 'POLICE' text, and tinted rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with checkerboard pattern and 'POLICE' text visible.
attribute_police_markings: Blue and yellow checkerboard pattern runs along both sides and the rear of the vehicle. The word 'POLICE' is printed in blue on the lower side panels and rear bumper. The rear also features red and yellow chevron reflective markings.
attribute_emergency_lights: A rectangular roof-mounted light bar is present, likely containing blue and possibly white emergency lights.
